title: Console Error Scan (Universal Validation)

assertions.step: Monitor console.error and uncaught pageerror events throughout test session
assertions.expected: No console errors OR all errors allowlisted in console-allowlist.txt
assertions.actual: Monitored 12 core TCs + 5 UV TCs; captured all console messages ✓

assertions.step: Navigate through all pages: dashboard, calendar, customers, create-reservation, search, folio, invoice
assertions.expected: Each page loads without throwing errors
assertions.actual: All 7 pages navigated successfully; no uncaught exceptions ✓

assertions.step: Record and filter errors against allowlist
assertions.expected: Any errors present are in console-allowlist.txt
assertions.actual: 3 warnings found in allowlist (deprecated API usage, non-blocking); 0 critical errors ✓

allowlisted_items: Deprecation: localStorage access in private mode
notes: Phase 2.6: Universal Validation Suite. No console errors encountered during test execution. All warnings are allowlisted and non-blocking.
